words.exampleArabic: حَرَّمَ الْإِسْلَامُ الرِّبَا فِي جَمِيعِ صُوَرِهِ.
words.exampleBs: Islam je zabranio kamatu u svim njenim oblicima.
words.exampleEn: Islam has prohibited usury in all its forms.

words.exampleArabic: الْمُرَابَحَةُ بَدِيلٌ إِسْلَامِيٌّ مَشْرُوعٌ عَنِ الْقَرْضِ بِالْفَائِدَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Murabaha je legitiman islamski alternativ kamatnom kreditu.
words.exampleEn: Murabaha is a lawful Islamic alternative to interest-based lending.

words.exampleArabic: تُصْدِرُ الْحُكُومَةُ صُكُوكًا لِتَمْوِيلِ الْمَشَارِيعِ الْكُبْرَى.
words.exampleBs: Vlada izdaje sukuke za finansiranje velikih projekata.
words.exampleEn: The government issues sukuk to finance major projects.

words.exampleArabic: تَجِبُ الزَّكَاةُ عَلَى كُلِّ مُسْلِمٍ بَلَغَ مَالُهُ النِّصَابَ.
words.exampleBs: Zekat je obavezan za svakog muslimana čiji imetak dosegne nisab.
words.exampleEn: Zakat is obligatory for every Muslim whose wealth reaches the nisab threshold.

words.exampleArabic: يُحَدَّدُ النِّصَابُ وِفْقًا لِقِيمَةِ الذَّهَبِ أَوِ الْفِضَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Nisab se određuje prema vrijednosti zlata ili srebra.
words.exampleEn: The nisab is determined according to the value of gold or silver.

words.exampleArabic: أَوْقَفَ الثَّرِيُّ أَرَاضِيَهُ وَقْفًا لِلتَّعْلِيمِ.
words.exampleBs: Bogataš je posvetio svoja imanja vakufom za obrazovanje.
words.exampleEn: The wealthy man endowed his land as a waqf for education.

words.exampleArabic: يَبْحَثُ الْمُسْلِمُونَ عَنْ فُرَصِ الِاسْتِثْمَارِ الْحَلَالِ.
words.exampleBs: Muslimani traže prilike za halal ulaganje.
words.exampleEn: Muslims seek halal investment opportunities.

words.exampleArabic: تَنْمُو الْمَصْرِفِيَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ بِسُرْعَةٍ فِي الدُّوَلِ الْخَلِيجِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Islamsko bankarstvo brzo raste u zemljama Zaljeva.
words.exampleEn: Islamic banking is growing rapidly in the Gulf states.

words.exampleArabic: ارْتَفَعَ النَّاتِجُ الْمَحَلِّيُّ الْإِجْمَالِيُّ بِنِسْبَةِ ثَلَاثَةٍ بِالْمِئَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Bruto domaći proizvod je porastao za tri posto.
words.exampleEn: The gross domestic product rose by three percent.

words.exampleArabic: أَدَّى التَّضَخُّمُ إِلَى تَرَاجُعِ الْقُدْرَةِ الشِّرَائِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Inflacija je dovela do smanjenja kupovne moći.
words.exampleEn: Inflation led to a decline in purchasing power.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَّبِعُ الْحُكُومَةُ سِيَاسَةً نَقْدِيَّةً مُحَافِظَةً.
words.exampleBs: Vlada slijedi konzervativnu monetarnu politiku.
words.exampleEn: The government follows a conservative monetary policy.

words.exampleArabic: تَسْتَهْدِفُ السِّيَاسَةُ الْمَالِيَّةُ تَحْقِيقَ التَّوَازُنِ فِي الْمِيزَانِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Fiskalna politika ima za cilj ostvarenje budžetske ravnoteže.
words.exampleEn: Fiscal policy aims to achieve balance in the budget.

words.exampleArabic: رَفَعَ الْبَنْكُ الْمَرْكَزِيُّ سِعْرَ الْفَائِدَةِ لِمُكَافَحَةِ التَّضَخُّمِ.
words.exampleBs: Centralna banka je podigla kamatnu stopu kako bi suzbila inflaciju.
words.exampleEn: The central bank raised the interest rate to combat inflation.

words.exampleArabic: تَأَثَّرَتِ الصَّادِرَاتُ بِتَقَلُّبَاتِ سِعْرِ الصَّرْفِ.
words.exampleBs: Na izvoz su utjecale fluktuacije deviznog kursa.
words.exampleEn: Exports were affected by fluctuations in the exchange rate.

words.exampleArabic: سَجَّلَتِ الدَّوْلَةُ عَجْزًا فِي مِيزَانِهَا التِّجَارِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Zemlja je zabilježila deficit u svojoj trgovinskoj bilanci.
words.exampleEn: The country recorded a deficit in its trade balance.

words.exampleArabic: تَعَانِي كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الدُّوَلِ مِنَ الرَّكُودِ الِاقْتِصَادِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Mnoge zemlje pate od ekonomske recesije.
words.exampleEn: Many countries are suffering from economic recession.

words.exampleArabic: فَرَضَتِ الْحُكُومَةُ سِيَاسَاتِ التَّقَشُّفِ لِتَقْلِيصِ الْعَجْزِ.
words.exampleBs: Vlada je uvela mjere štednje kako bi smanjila deficit.
words.exampleEn: The government imposed austerity measures to reduce the deficit.

words.exampleArabic: اشْتَرَى مَجْمُوعَةً مِنَ الأَسْهُمِ فِي شَرِكَاتٍ حَلَالٍ.
words.exampleBs: Kupio je paket dionica u halal kompanijama.
words.exampleEn: He bought a set of shares in halal companies.

words.exampleArabic: تُعَدُّ السَّنَدَاتُ الْحُكُومِيَّةُ مِنْ أَكْثَرِ الأَدَوَاتِ الْمَالِيَّةِ أَمَانًا.
words.exampleBs: Državne obveznice smatraju se jednim od najsigurnijih finansijskih instrumenata.
words.exampleEn: Government bonds are considered among the safest financial instruments.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَضَمَّنُ الْمَحْفَظَةُ الِاسْتِثْمَارِيَّةُ أَصُولًا مُتَنَوِّعَةً.
words.exampleBs: Investicioni portfolio uključuje raznovrsnu imovinu.
words.exampleEn: The investment portfolio includes diverse assets.

words.exampleArabic: أَعْلَنَتِ الشَّرِكَةُ عَنْ تَوْزِيعِ أَرْبَاحٍ سَنَوِيَّةٍ لِلْمُسَاهِمِينَ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija je objavila godišnju raspodjelu dividendi dioničarima.
words.exampleEn: The company announced annual dividend distribution for shareholders.

words.exampleArabic: تَخْضَعُ مَكَاسِبُ رَأْسِ الْمَالِ لِلضَّرِيبَةِ فِي أَغْلَبِ الدُّوَلِ.
words.exampleBs: Kapitalni dobici podliježu oporezivanju u većini zemalja.
words.exampleEn: Capital gains are subject to taxation in most countries.

words.exampleArabic: إِدَارَةُ الْمَخَاطِرِ أَسَاسِيَّةٌ فِي أَيِّ خِطَّةٍ مَالِيَّةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Upravljanje rizicima je osnovno u svakom finansijskom planu.
words.exampleEn: Risk management is fundamental in any financial plan.

words.exampleArabic: التَّنْوِيعُ فِي الِاسْتِثْمَارَاتِ يُقَلِّلُ الْمَخَاطِرَ.
words.exampleBs: Diverzifikacija ulaganja smanjuje rizike.
words.exampleEn: Diversification in investments reduces risks.

words.exampleArabic: يَسْتَهْدِفُ صَنْدُوقُ التَّحَوُّطِ عَوَائِدَ مُرْتَفِعَةً بِاسْتِرَاتِيجِيَّاتٍ مُعَقَّدَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Hedge fond cilja visoke prinose složenim strategijama.
words.exampleEn: A hedge fund targets high returns through complex strategies.

words.exampleArabic: ضَخَّتْ شَرِكَةُ الأَسْهُمِ الْخَاصَّةِ مَلَايِينَ فِي الْمَشْرُوعِ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija privatnog kapitala uložila je milione u projekat.
words.exampleEn: The private equity firm pumped millions into the project.

words.exampleArabic: ارْتَفَعَتِ الأَسْهُمُ فِي بُورْصَةِ الأَوْرَاقِ الْمَالِيَّةِ الْيَوْمَ.
words.exampleBs: Dionice su porasle na berzi danas.
words.exampleEn: Stocks rose on the stock exchange today.

words.exampleArabic: تَأَثَّرَ سُوقُ السِّلَعِ بِتَقَلُّبَاتِ أَسْعَارِ النَّفْطِ.
words.exampleBs: Tržište roba je pod utjecajem fluktuacija cijena nafte.
words.exampleEn: The commodity market was affected by oil price fluctuations.

words.exampleArabic: تُسْتَخْدَمُ الْعُقُودُ الْآجِلَةُ لِلتَّحَوُّطِ ضِدَّ تَقَلُّبَاتِ الأَسْعَارِ.
words.exampleBs: Terminski ugovori se koriste za zaštitu od promjena cijena.
words.exampleEn: Futures contracts are used to hedge against price fluctuations.

words.exampleArabic: الْمُشْتَقَّاتُ الْمَالِيَّةُ أَدَوَاتٌ مُعَقَّدَةٌ تَنْطَوِي عَلَى مَخَاطِرَ عَالِيَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Finansijski derivati su složeni instrumenti koji nose visoke rizike.
words.exampleEn: Financial derivatives are complex instruments that carry high risks.

words.exampleArabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الشَّرِكَاتِ الْحِفَاظُ عَلَى مُسْتَوَى كَافٍ مِنَ السُّيُولَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanije moraju održavati odgovarajući nivo likvidnosti.
words.exampleEn: Companies must maintain an adequate level of liquidity.

words.exampleArabic: تَشْهَدُ أَسْوَاقُ الْعُمْلَاتِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ تَقَلُّبًا حَادًّا.
words.exampleBs: Tržišta kriptovaluta pokazuju izrazitu volatilnost.
words.exampleEn: Cryptocurrency markets show sharp volatility.

words.exampleArabic: تَمُرُّ الْبُورْصَةُ بِمَرْحَلَةِ سُوقٍ صَاعِدَةٍ مُنْذُ أَشْهُرٍ.
words.exampleBs: Berza prolazi kroz fazu tržišta bikova već nekoliko mjeseci.
words.exampleEn: The stock exchange has been in a bull market phase for months.

words.exampleArabic: أَصَابَتِ السُّوقُ الْهَابِطَةُ كَثِيرًا مِنَ الْمُسْتَثْمِرِينَ بِخَسَائِرَ.
words.exampleBs: Tržište medvjeda nanijelo je gubitke mnogim investitorima.
words.exampleEn: The bear market caused losses for many investors.

words.exampleArabic: أَعْلَنَتِ الشَّرِكَتَانِ عَنِ اتِّفَاقِيَّةِ اندِمَاجٍ رَسْمِيَّةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Dvije kompanije su objavile zvaničan sporazum o spajanju.
words.exampleEn: The two companies announced a formal merger agreement.

words.exampleArabic: أَتَمَّتِ الشَّرِكَةُ الْكُبْرَى الِاسْتِحْوَاذَ عَلَى مُنَافِسِهَا الأَصْغَرِ.
words.exampleBs: Velika kompanija je završila preuzimanje svog manjeg konkurenta.
words.exampleEn: The larger company completed the acquisition of its smaller competitor.

words.exampleArabic: أَثَارَ الطَّرْحُ الْعَامُّ الأَوَّلِيُّ لِلشَّرِكَةِ اهْتِمَامًا وَاسِعًا.
words.exampleBs: Prva javna ponuda kompanije izazvala je široko interesovanje.
words.exampleEn: The company's initial public offering attracted widespread interest.

words.exampleArabic: بَلَغَتِ الإِيرَادَاتُ السَّنَوِيَّةُ مِئَةَ مِلْيُونِ دُولَارٍ.
words.exampleBs: Godišnji prihodi su dostigli sto miliona dolara.
words.exampleEn: Annual revenues reached one hundred million dollars.

words.en: EBITDA (earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, amortization)
words.exampleArabic: يُعَدُّ مُؤَشِّرُ الأَرْبَاحِ قَبْلَ الِاسْتِقْطَاعَاتِ مِعْيَارًا رَئِيسِيًّا لِتَقْيِيمِ الشَّرِكَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: EBITDA se smatra ključnim pokazateljem za vrednovanje kompanija.
words.exampleEn: EBITDA is considered a key metric for valuing companies.

words.exampleArabic: تَكْشِفُ الْمِيزَانِيَّةُ الْعُمُومِيَّةُ عَنْ الْوَضْعِ الْمَالِيِّ لِلشَّرِكَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Bilans stanja otkriva finansijsku poziciju kompanije.
words.exampleEn: The balance sheet reveals the company's financial position.

words.exampleArabic: الشَّرِكَةُ تُحَقِّقُ تَدَفُّقًا نَقْدِيًّا إِيجَابِيًّا بِاسْتِمْرَارٍ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija kontinuirano ostvaruje pozitivan novčani tok.
words.exampleEn: The company continuously generates positive cash flow.

words.exampleArabic: أَجْرَتِ الشَّرِكَةُ تَدْقِيقًا مَالِيًّا سَنَوِيًّا لِحِسَابَاتِهَا.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija je provela godišnju finansijsku reviziju svojih računa.
words.exampleEn: The company conducted an annual financial audit of its accounts.

words.exampleArabic: نَشَرَتِ الشَّرِكَةُ بَيَانَاتِهَا الْمَالِيَّةَ لِلرُّبْعِ الأَوَّلِ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija je objavila finansijske izvještaje za prvo tromjesečje.
words.exampleEn: The company published its financial statements for the first quarter.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْتَاجُ الْمَشْرُوعُ إِلَى رَأْسِ مَالٍ كَافٍ لِلِانْطِلَاقِ.
words.exampleBs: Projektu je potreban dovoljan kapital za pokretanje.
words.exampleEn: The project needs sufficient capital to launch.

words.exampleArabic: تَمْلِكُ الشَّرِكَةُ أَصُولًا تَفُوقُ قِيمَتُهَا مِلْيَارَ دُولَارٍ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija posjeduje imovinu vrijednu više od milijarde dolara.
words.exampleEn: The company owns assets worth more than one billion dollars.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَجَاوَزُ الْخُصُومُ الأَصُولَ مِمَّا يَدُلُّ عَلَى إِفْلَاسٍ مُحْتَمَلٍ.
words.exampleBs: Obaveze premašuju imovinu, što ukazuje na moguć stečaj.
words.exampleEn: Liabilities exceed assets, indicating a possible insolvency.

words.exampleArabic: ارْتَفَعَتْ حُقُوقُ الْمُسَاهِمِينَ بَعْدَ رِبْحِيَّةٍ مُسْتَمِرَّةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Dioničarski kapital je porastao nakon kontinuirane profitabilnosti.
words.exampleEn: Shareholders' equity rose after sustained profitability.

words.exampleArabic: يَسْعَى كُلُّ مُسْتَثْمِرٍ إِلَى تَحْقِيقِ أَعْلَى عَائِدٍ عَلَى الِاسْتِثْمَارِ.
words.exampleBs: Svaki investitor nastoji ostvariti što veći povrat na ulaganje.
words.exampleEn: Every investor seeks to achieve the highest return on investment.

words.exampleArabic: حَصَلَتِ الشَّرِكَةُ الْجَدِيدَةُ عَلَى تَمْوِيلٍ مِنْ صَنْدُوقِ اسْتِثْمَارٍ.
words.exampleBs: Nova kompanija je dobila finansiranje od investicionog fonda.
words.exampleEn: The new company received financing from an investment fund.

words.exampleArabic: يُحَدِّدُ الِاسْتِهْلَاكُ الدَّاخِلِيُّ مَدَى قُوَّةِ الِاقْتِصَادِ.
words.exampleBs: Domaća potrošnja određuje snagu ekonomije.
words.exampleEn: Domestic consumption determines the strength of the economy.

words.exampleArabic: تَسْعَى الْحُكُومَةُ إِلَى تَقْلِيصِ الْعَجْزِ فِي الْمِيزَانِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Vlada nastoji smanjiti deficit u budžetu.
words.exampleEn: The government seeks to reduce the budget deficit.

words.exampleArabic: حَقَّقَتِ الدَّوْلَةُ فَائِضًا فِي مِيزَانِيَّتِهَا لِلسَّنَةِ الثَّانِيَةِ عَلَى التَّوَالِي.
words.exampleBs: Zemlja je ostvarila suficit u budžetu drugu godinu zaredom.
words.exampleEn: The country achieved a budget surplus for the second consecutive year.

words.exampleArabic: بَلَغَ تَقْيِيمُ الشَّرِكَةِ عَشَرَةَ مَلَايِينَ دُولَارٍ بَعْدَ جَوْلَةِ الِاسْتِثْمَارِ.
words.exampleBs: Vrednovanje kompanije je dostiglo deset miliona dolara nakon investicionog kruga.
words.exampleEn: The company's valuation reached ten million dollars after the investment round.
